title: Badlands (disambiguation)
content:
'''Badlands''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Badlands (E'ronoh)|Badlands]]''' of [[E'ronoh]]
*The '''[[Badlands of N'g'zi]]''', a [[desert]] on [[Geonosis]]
*The '''[[Goazon Badlands]]''' on [[Jakku]]
*The '''[[Rystan Badlands]]''', an icy [[asteroid field]]
*The '''[[Badlands (Siline)|badlands]]''' of [[Siline]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Locations===
*The '''[[Badlands (Lok)|Badlands]]''', a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]
*The '''[[Badlands (Moorja)|badlands]]''' of [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]]
*The '''[[Badlands (Ord Cestus)|Badlands]]''', a desert on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]
*The '''[[Badlands (Ord Mantell)|Badlands]]''', a region on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]
*The '''[[Badlands (Pamorjal)|Badlands]]''', a region of [[Pamorjal]]
*The '''[[Badlands (Ryloth)|Badlands]]''', a desert on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]
*'''[[Badlands (Tatooine)/Legends|Badlands]]''', a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] track on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Badlands of N'g'zi/Legends|Badlands of N'g'zi]]''', a desert on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]
*The '''[[Avilatan Badlands]]''' on [[Avilatan]] on Ord Mantell
*'''[[Doaba Badlands]]''', a massive desert on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]
*'''[[Kamar Badlands]]''', a desert on [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]]
*'''[[Lukhur Badlands]]''', a desert on [[Nishr]]
*'''[[Xulropic Badlands]]''', an area on Tatooine

===Other===
*'''[[Badlands (CR90 corvette)|''Badlands'']]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]

{{Disambig}}
